label: Damage
description: Defines a damage type used by weapons, traps, hazards, and abilities. Controls how the damage interacts with armor, blood, hediffs, explosions, and combat log rules.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# DamageWorker type that implements the hit resolution logic for this damage type.

externalViolence.label: External violence
externalViolence.description: If true, this damage type is counted as external violence for all targets. Private in source but XML-backed.

externalViolenceForMechanoids.label: External violence for mechanoids
externalViolenceForMechanoids.description: If true, this damage type is counted as external violence when hitting mechanoids or turrets. Private in source but XML-backed.

hasForcefulImpact.label: Has forceful impact
hasForcefulImpact.description: If true, this damage type can knock back targets on hit.

harmsHealth.label: Harms health
harmsHealth.description: If false, this damage type does not reduce pawn health or destroy body parts.

makesBlood.label: Makes blood
makesBlood.description: If true, this damage type causes blood splatter and filth when hitting pawns.

canInterruptJobs.label: Can interrupt jobs
canInterruptJobs.description: If true, being hit by this damage type can interrupt the target's current job.

isRanged.label: Is ranged
isRanged.description: If true, this damage type is classified as ranged for combat log and behavior purposes.

makesAnimalsFlee.label: Makes animals flee
makesAnimalsFlee.description: If true, wild animals that receive this damage type may flee from the attacker.

execution.label: Execution
execution.description: If true, this damage type is treated as an execution for social and faction relation purposes.

combatLogRules.label: Combat log rules
combatLogRules.description: RulePackDef that generates the grammar string shown in the combat log for hits with this damage type.

buildingDamageFactor.label: Building damage factor
buildingDamageFactor.description: Multiplier applied to damage dealt to any building.

buildingDamageFactorPassable.label: Building damage factor (passable)
buildingDamageFactorPassable.description: Multiplier applied to damage dealt to passable buildings such as doors.

buildingDamageFactorImpassable.label: Building damage factor (impassable)
buildingDamageFactorImpassable.description: Multiplier applied to damage dealt to impassable buildings such as walls.

plantDamageFactor.label: Plant damage factor
plantDamageFactor.description: Multiplier applied to damage dealt to plants.

corpseDamageFactor.label: Corpse damage factor
corpseDamageFactor.description: Multiplier applied to damage dealt to corpses.

causeStun.label: Cause stun
causeStun.description: If true, hits with this damage type can cause the target to enter a stunned state.

stunAdaptationTicks.label: Stun adaptation ticks
stunAdaptationTicks.description: Number of ticks after a stun before the same stun source can stun the target again.

constantStunDurationTicks.label: Constant stun duration ticks
constantStunDurationTicks.description: When set, overrides the stun duration to exactly this many ticks regardless of damage amount. Absence means stun duration scales with damage.

stunResistStat.label: Stun resist stat
stunResistStat.description: StatDef on the target that reduces the chance or duration of stuns from this damage type.

displayAdaptedTextMote.label: Display adapted text mote
displayAdaptedTextMote.description: If true, a text mote is shown above the target when they have adapted to this stun damage type.

adaptedText.label: Adapted text
adaptedText.description: Translated text shown in the mote when a target has adapted to this stun type.

canUseDeflectMetalEffect.label: Can use deflect metal effect
canUseDeflectMetalEffect.description: If true, hitting metal armor with this damage type may trigger the deflect-metal visual effect.

impactSoundType.label: Impact sound type
impactSoundType.description: ImpactSoundTypeDef that determines which sound plays when this damage type hits a target.

deathMessage.label: Death message
deathMessage.description: Localized message shown in the game log when a pawn is killed by this damage type. Supports format argument {0} for the victim's name.

damageEffecter.label: Damage effecter
damageEffecter.description: EffecterDef spawned at the point of impact when this damage type hits.

defaultDamage.label: Default damage
defaultDamage.description: Default damage amount used when no explicit amount is provided. -1 means no default.

defaultArmorPenetration.label: Default armor penetration
defaultArmorPenetration.description: Default armor penetration fraction (0–1+) used when no explicit value is provided. -1 means no default.

defaultStoppingPower.label: Default stopping power
defaultStoppingPower.description: Default stopping power value applied when no explicit value is provided.

additionalHediffs.label: Additional hediffs
additionalHediffs.description: List of hediffs applied in addition to the primary injury when this damage type hits a pawn.

additionalHediffsThisPart.label: Additional hediffs this part
additionalHediffsThisPart.description: HediffDefs applied only to the specific body part that received the hit.

applyAdditionalHediffsIfHuntingForFood.label: Apply additional hediffs if hunting for food
applyAdditionalHediffsIfHuntingForFood.description: If false, additional hediffs are suppressed when the attacker is hunting for food.

armorCategory.label: Armor category
armorCategory.description: DamageArmorCategoryDef that determines which armor stat resists this damage type.

minDamageToFragment.label: Min damage to fragment
minDamageToFragment.description: Minimum damage in a single hit required to fragment (shatter) the target part. 99999 means fragmentation is effectively disabled.

overkillPctToDestroyPart.label: Overkill pct to destroy part
overkillPctToDestroyPart.description: Fraction of overkill damage (relative to part health) required to destroy the part outright. A random value in this range is drawn each hit.

consideredHelpful.label: Considered helpful
consideredHelpful.description: If true, receiving this damage type does not count as an aggressive act against the target.

igniteChanceByTargetFlammability.label: Ignite chance by target flammability
igniteChanceByTargetFlammability.description: Curve mapping target flammability (X) to ignition probability (Y) when this damage hits a cell or thing.

igniteCellChance.label: Ignite cell chance
igniteCellChance.description: Flat probability (0–1) that this damage type ignites the hit cell.

ignoreShields.label: Ignore shields
ignoreShields.description: If true, this damage type passes through personal and building shields.

harmAllLayersUntilOutside.label: Harm all layers until outside
harmAllLayersUntilOutside.description: If true, the damage propagates through all apparel layers until it reaches outside.

hediff.label: Hediff
hediff.description: HediffDef applied to the hit body part when this damage type injures a pawn.

hediffSkin.label: Hediff (skin)
hediffSkin.description: HediffDef applied when the damage hits a skin-layer body part.

hediffSolid.label: Hediff (solid)
hediffSolid.description: HediffDef applied when the damage hits a solid (bone or inner) body part.

isExplosive.label: Is explosive
isExplosive.description: If true, this damage type is treated as an explosion and uses the explosion visual and sound fields.

explosionSnowMeltAmount.label: Explosion snow melt amount
explosionSnowMeltAmount.description: Amount of snow melted by each explosion cell.

explosionAffectOutsidePartsOnly.label: Explosion affect outside parts only
explosionAffectOutsidePartsOnly.description: If true, the explosion damage only affects external body parts.

explosionCellMote.label: Explosion cell mote
explosionCellMote.description: ThingDef (mote) spawned at each cell hit by the explosion.

explosionCellFleck.label: Explosion cell fleck
explosionCellFleck.description: FleckDef spawned at each cell hit by the explosion.

explosionColorCenter.label: Explosion color (center)
explosionColorCenter.description: Color of the explosion effect at its center. Defaults to white.

explosionColorEdge.label: Explosion color (edge)
explosionColorEdge.description: Color of the explosion effect at its outer edge. Defaults to white.

explosionInteriorEffecter.label: Explosion interior effecter
explosionInteriorEffecter.description: EffecterDef spawned at each interior cell of the explosion.

explosionInteriorMote.label: Explosion interior mote
explosionInteriorMote.description: ThingDef (mote) spawned at interior cells of the explosion.

explosionInteriorFleck.label: Explosion interior fleck
explosionInteriorFleck.description: FleckDef spawned at interior cells of the explosion.

explosionCenterMote.label: Explosion center mote
explosionCenterMote.description: ThingDef (mote) spawned at the center of the explosion.

explosionCenterFleck.label: Explosion center fleck
explosionCenterFleck.description: FleckDef spawned at the center of the explosion.

explosionCenterEffecter.label: Explosion center effecter
explosionCenterEffecter.description: EffecterDef spawned at the center of the explosion.

explosionCellEffecter.label: Explosion cell effecter
explosionCellEffecter.description: EffecterDef spawned at individual cells hit by the explosion, subject to chance and radius limits.

explosionCellEffecterChance.label: Explosion cell effecter chance
explosionCellEffecterChance.description: Probability (0–1) that the cell effecter spawns at each affected cell.

explosionCellEffecterMaxRadius.label: Explosion cell effecter max radius
explosionCellEffecterMaxRadius.description: Maximum radius from the explosion center within which cell effecters can spawn.

explosionHeatEnergyPerCell.label: Explosion heat energy per cell
explosionHeatEnergyPerCell.description: Amount of heat energy added to each cell hit by the explosion.

expolosionPropagationSpeed.label: Explosion propagation speed
expolosionPropagationSpeed.description: Speed at which the explosion propagates outward. Preserved with source typo ('expolosion'). Higher values make the explosion ring expand faster.

soundExplosion.label: Sound explosion
soundExplosion.description: SoundDef played when this explosive damage type detonates.

explosionInteriorCellCountMultiplier.label: Explosion interior cell count multiplier
explosionInteriorCellCountMultiplier.description: Multiplier on how many interior cells are sampled for interior effecter and fleck spawning.

explosionInteriorCellDistanceMultiplier.label: Explosion interior cell distance multiplier
explosionInteriorCellDistanceMultiplier.description: Multiplier on the radius used when selecting interior cells for effecter and fleck spawning.

stabChanceOfForcedInternal.label: Stab chance of forced internal
stabChanceOfForcedInternal.description: Probability (0–1) that a stab hit is forced to target an internal body part.

cutExtraTargetsCurve.label: Cut extra targets curve
cutExtraTargetsCurve.description: Curve mapping attack damage (X) to the number of additional targets cleaved on a cut attack (Y).

cutCleaveBonus.label: Cut cleave bonus
cutCleaveBonus.description: Additional cleave width added to cut attacks with this damage type.

bluntInnerHitChance.label: Blunt inner hit chance
bluntInnerHitChance.description: Probability (0–1) that a blunt hit also damages an internal part.

bluntInnerHitDamageFractionToConvert.label: Blunt inner hit damage fraction to convert
bluntInnerHitDamageFractionToConvert.description: Range of fractions of the outer hit damage that is converted and applied to the inner part.

bluntInnerHitDamageFractionToAdd.label: Blunt inner hit damage fraction to add
bluntInnerHitDamageFractionToAdd.description: Range of additional damage fractions added on top when an inner hit occurs.

bluntStunDuration.label: Blunt stun duration
bluntStunDuration.description: Duration multiplier for stuns caused by blunt hits with this damage type.

bluntStunChancePerDamagePctOfCorePartToH.label: Blunt stun chance per damage pct of core part (head)
bluntStunChancePerDamagePctOfCorePartToH.description: Curve mapping damage as a fraction of core-part health (X) to the probability of stunning when hitting the head (Y).

bluntStunChancePerDamagePctOfCorePartToB.label: Blunt stun chance per damage pct of core part (body)
bluntStunChancePerDamagePctOfCorePartToB.description: Curve mapping damage as a fraction of core-part health (X) to the probability of stunning when hitting the body (Y).

scratchSplitPercentage.label: Scratch split percentage
scratchSplitPercentage.description: Fraction of scratch damage applied to the outer layer versus split to adjacent parts.

scaleDamageToBuildingsBasedOnFlammabilit.label: Scale damage to buildings based on flammability
scaleDamageToBuildingsBasedOnFlammabilit.description: If true, damage dealt to buildings is scaled proportionally to the building's flammability stat.

basic-damage.label: Basic damage type
basic-damage.description: Minimal damage type with a worker class and health interaction settings.

explosive-damage.label: Explosive damage type
explosive-damage.description: Damage type intended for area explosions with color and sound fields.
